title: Roman Structures
description: This mod adds structures from the Great Roman Empire into Minecraft
body:
[![alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/aa8962f9-e6ff-4a83-8eeb-d145d3c55343.webp) ](https://bisecthosting.com/Zoni25)

This is a simple mod that intends to add a lot of Roman Structures to Minecraft.

 

Current Structures
-Marketplace

-House

-2 Thermopolium

-Ferrarius

With a lot more structures to come!

 

Credits
All the buildings so far where made by Trydar. So check his channel and give him some support!

 

If you want to get updates on the mod development, report bugs or suggest new stuff or just contact me join my discord server:
https://discord.com/invite/KWGakdBVwG
